action.reasoning: Observation: best avg_acc still 0.465 from iter2 (replay=200/task, val~0.47); iters 3-4 with Adam+Cosine gave ~0.07-0.08 due to LR collapse (only last/early tasks learned, val stuck ~0.05-0.09). Analysis: low replay ratio early (e.g. 300 vs 4500 samples) + optimizer/scheduler mismatch caused overwriting; curves flat, forgetting severe. Decision: rewrite clean train.py with SGD(momentum=0.9, lr=0.1 decaying per task), memory_per_task=500 (better ratio, total~5k), epochs_per_task=10, fixed LR schedule, proper random exemplar selection from current task only + optional cap at 5000, more frequent early logging. This should recover >0.5 avg_acc. Keep model.py/predict.py unchanged. Run training then submit_eval.
